```{=html}
<div class="swtbl-outer">
 <div class="swtbl-header">
  <div class="swtbl-header-cell">Essential</div>
  <div class="swtbl-header-cell">Description</div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-icon" href="https://claude.com/claude-code" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#CC785C" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" aria-label="Anthropic"><path d="M17.3041 3.541h-3.6718l6.696 16.918H24Zm-10.6082 0L0 20.459h3.7442l1.3693-3.5527h7.0052l1.3693 3.5528h3.7442L10.5363 3.5409Zm-.3712 10.2232 2.2914-5.9456 2.2914 5.9456Z"/></svg>
   </a>
   <a href="https://claude.com/claude-code" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Claude Code</a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>The AI coding agent we use throughout the workshop.</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-icon" href="https://positron.posit.co" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="images/software/positron-icon.png" alt="Positron" />
   </a>
   <a href="https://positron.posit.co" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Positron</a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>Data-science IDE built on VS Code, with side-by-side source and rendered output.</div></div>
 </div>

 <div class="swtbl-row">
  <div class="swtbl-software">
   <a class="swtbl-software-icon" href="https://spokenly.app" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="images/software/spokenly-logo.png" alt="Spokenly" />
   </a>
   <a href="https://spokenly.app" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Spokenly</a>
  </div>
  <div class="swtbl-desc"><div>AI powered voice-to-text application.</div></div>
 </div>
</div>
```
